display.purpose: Desktop home title — full name in large, tight weight. One use per screen.

headline.purpose: Section headings inside Portfolio Hub windows.

label.purpose: System data only: timestamps, terminal lines, tech-stack, status readouts.

mono.purpose: Terminal font. IBM Plex Mono for all machine-readable output.

shadows.name: window-ambient
shadows.purpose: Default window resting state in comfort theme.

shadows.name: window-focused
shadows.purpose: Active focused window. The 3px System Blue ring is the focus indicator.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Desktop shortcut and card hover state.

shadows.name: taskbar
shadows.purpose: Floating taskbar. Sits visually higher than windows.

shadows.name: glow-green
shadows.purpose: Terminal cursor and active green-accented elements in dark shell only.

shadows.name: glow-purple
shadows.purpose: Terminal path indicators in dark shell only.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Window open, scale-in, slide-up entrance animations.

motion.name: transition-normal
motion.purpose: Window chrome transitions, taskbar tab changes.

motion.name: bios-fade-out
motion.purpose: BIOS screen exit — scales slightly (1→1.1) as it fades.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Single-column layout, smaller type, compact taskbar.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Primary action in Portfolio Hub home. Solid System Blue.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 10px; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,95,168,0.38); background: #0078D4; color: #fff; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #006CBF; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,120,212,0.3); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 40px; padding: 0 16px; border-radius: 10px; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.82); color: rgba(32,32,32,0.92); font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), border-color 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.86); border-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.12); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,120,212,0.2); }

components.name: Accent Button (Shell)
components.description: Green-accented button for the dark BIOS shell context.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(0,200,150,0.15); color: #00C896; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,200,150,0.25); font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: rgba(0,200,150,0.22); box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0,200,150,0.45), 0 0 32px rgba(0,200,150,0.15); } .ds-btn-accent:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,200,150,0.3); }

components.name: Status Badge — Live
components.description: Green status chip for live/shipped projects.
components.css: .ds-badge-live { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(0,200,150,0.15); color: #00C896; border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,200,150,0.25); letter-spacing: 0.04em; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Status Badge — WIP
components.css: .ds-badge-wip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(94,92,230,0.10); color: #5E5CE6; border: 0.5px solid rgba(94,92,230,0.18); letter-spacing: 0.04em; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Tech Tag
components.description: Monospace pill for technology stack labels.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 10px; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 9999px; font-weight: 400; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); color: rgba(32,32,32,0.68); transition: all 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); letter-spacing: 0.03em; } .ds-tag:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); color: rgba(32,32,32,0.94); }

components.name: App Window
components.description: Main floating window container. Frosted glass, draggable titlebar.
components.html:
Portfolio Hub

Content goes here.
components.css: .ds-window { background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.94), rgba(248,250,252,0.96)); backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(1.12); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(28px) saturate(1.12); border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08); border-radius: 18px; box-shadow: 0 22px 62px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.72); overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 320px; min-height: 200px; } .ds-window__bar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 46px; padding: 0 8px 0 16px; border-bottom: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.07); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.34); cursor: grab; user-select: none; } .ds-window__bar:active { cursor: grabbing; } .ds-window__title { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: rgba(32,32,32,0.68); letter-spacing: 0.07em; } .ds-window__controls { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .ds-window__ctrl { width: 38px; height: 32px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: none; border-radius: 9px; background: transparent; color: rgba(32,32,32,0.70); font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-window__ctrl:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.055); color: rgba(32,32,32,0.94); } .ds-window__ctrl--close:hover { background: rgba(232,17,35,0.92); color: white; } .ds-window__body { padding: 16px; flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(32,32,32,0.94); line-height: 1.65; }

components.name: Desktop Shortcut
components.description: App launcher card on the OS desktop. Hover lifts with shadow.
components.html:
PH

Portfolio Hub

Projects, skills, proof of work
components.css: .ds-shortcut { position: relative; padding: 14px; border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.92), rgba(248,250,252,0.82)); border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.07); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.66); transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms, transform 150ms; cursor: pointer; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-shortcut:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.10); box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.10), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.72); } .ds-shortcut__glyph { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: white; margin-bottom: 10px; } .ds-shortcut__glyph--green { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0078D4, #00A2ED); } .ds-shortcut__glyph--purple { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5E5CE6, #0078D4); } .ds-shortcut__glyph--orange { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #C19C00, #0078D4); } .ds-shortcut__name { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(17,24,39,0.92); line-height: 1.25; margin: 0; } .ds-shortcut__desc { display: block; margin-top: 7px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; line-height: 1.35; color: rgba(17,24,39,0.64); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field for contact and search. Focus ring is the primary indicator.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.10); border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: rgba(32,32,32,0.94); outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(32,32,32,0.46); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(0,200,150,0.25); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,200,150,0.15); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); }

narrative.overview:
A dark airlock opening into a precision workstation. The 3D BIOS shell is the door — atmospheric, cinematic, phosphor-lit. The light OS interior is the work — operational, scannable, credible. Both surfaces are deliberate. Neither decorates by default.

The outer shell speaks in terminal emerald on near-void black. The inner windows speak in system white, Inter, and System Blue. The transition between them is the design statement: entering the monitor is crossing a threshold from spectacle to signal. The shell earns the content's credibility; the content earns the shell's ambition.

This system rejects every form of AI-portfolio comfort: no cream or warm-beige backgrounds, no gradient text, no glassmorphism used decoratively, no SaaS hero-metric layout, no numbered section eyebrows, no tracked all-caps kickers above every heading.
keyCharacteristics: Two distinct visual registers: shell (dark, phosphor) and interior (light, operational)
Phosphor Signal green (#00C896) is the brand color; System Blue (#0078D4) is the OS interaction color
Monospace reserved for system readouts, terminal lines, status labels, timestamps, and tech-stack values only
Glass surfaces in the comfort theme are functional (window chrome, taskbar blur) not decorative
Motion is purposeful: BIOS typewriter, window open/close, list stagger — no scroll-jacked choreography

rules.name: The Two-Register Rule
rules.body: Phosphor Signal (#00C896) belongs to the dark BIOS shell. System Blue (#0078D4) belongs to the light OS desktop. Mixing them breaks the threshold. Each register has one primary accent; keep them sovereign.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Phosphor Signal appears on ≤15% of any light-theme screen. Its rarity in the interior is the point: when it does appear (terminal cursor, a badge), it reads as a deliberate reference back to the shell.

rules.name: The Mono Discipline Rule
rules.body: Monospace is reserved for system data: terminal lines, stack labels, timestamps, status readouts. The moment it appears in running prose or section headings, it stops reading as 'system voice' and starts reading as 'developer aesthetic costume.'

rules.name: The Scale Ratio Rule
rules.body: Steps between display (54px) → headline (32px) → title (20px) → body (14px) maintain ≥1.40 ratio. Never compress steps to less than 1.25× — flat scales read as uncommitted.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces at rest carry only the inset bevel highlight. Drop shadows appear on hover or focused state. A page that shadows everything equally has no focal hierarchy.

rules.name: The Register Firewall Rule
rules.body: Glow-style box-shadows (colored, radial, bloom-like) belong to the dark shell only. In the comfort theme, all shadows are achromatic (rgba black alpha). A green glow on a white window surface is a register violation.

dos: Do use Phosphor Signal (#00C896) as the primary accent on dark surfaces and sparingly (≤15% surface area) on light surfaces.
Do use IBM Plex Mono exclusively for system data: timestamps, terminal output, tech-stack labels, status readouts, and window titles.
Do verify WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1) on all body text, especially --text-secondary (rgba(32,32,32,0.68)) against #F3F3F3 backgrounds.
Do use the window focused state (border: 0.5px solid rgba(0,120,212,0.24) + blue ring) to indicate the active window.
Do provide a prefers-reduced-motion override for every animation.
Do preserve the 7px solid white border on the BIOS popup dialog.
Do reserve backdrop-filter blur (28–30px) for the window chrome and taskbar.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient fill). Ever.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. Blur surfaces belong to window chrome only.
Don't display stats in a hero-metric grid layout: big number, small label, gradient accent.
Don't add tracked all-caps eyebrows above every section.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as scaffold.
Don't mix the two elevation languages: no colored glows on light-theme surfaces, no achromatic shadows on the dark shell.
Don't use a warm-tinted or cream background. Desktop bg is #F3F3F3 — neutral grey, chroma 0.
Don't display the portfolio as a dark editorial / dev blog: pure black + mono-only + minimal-everything reads as a README, not a portfolio.
